Comments/Action Taken:
Cases reported from Districts Districts/Corporations
Ahmedabad, AMC, Arvalli, Banaskanth, Bharuch, Bhavnagar,
Chhotaudepur, Dahod, Devbhumi Dwarka, Gandhinagar, Gir
Somnath, GMC, Jamnagar, JMC, Kheda, Kutch, Mahisagar,
Mahesana, Morbi, Narmada, Panch Mahal, Porbandar, Rajkot,
RMC, Sabar Kantha, SMC, Surendranagar, Vadodara and
VMC. Cases presented with fever, convulsions, altered
sensorium. Total 129 serum or CSF samples were sent to NIV
Pune and GBRC Gandhinagar. Out of 129 samples, 47 were
positive for CHPV by RT-PCR/CHPV Antibody. District
RRTs investigated the outbreak. IEC, community awareness
and health education given by peripheral team on vector
control measures, hygiene and sanitation. Malathion dusting &
IRS spraying was done. Surveillance activity was initiated.
Total 56 deaths between the age group of 1-15 years have
occurred due to the illness, out of which 17 were positive for
CHPV.

Comments/Action Taken:
Cases reported from Districts / Corporations: Ahmedabad,
AMC, Arvalli, Banaskanth, Bharuch, Bhavnagar,
Chhotaudepur, Dahod, Devbhumi Dwarka, Gandhinagar, Gir
Somnath, GMC, Jamnagar, JMC, Kheda, Kutch, Mahisagar,
Mahesana, Morbi, Narmada, Panch Mahal, Patan, Porbandar,
Rajkot, RMC, Sabar Kantha, SMC, Surendranagar,Vadodara,
VMC. Cases presented with fever, convulsions, altered
sensorium. Total 151 serum or CSF samples were sent to NIV
Pune and GBRC Gandhinagar. Out of 151 samples, 57 were
positive for CHPV by RT-PCR/CHPV Antibody. District
RRTs investigated the outbreak. IEC and community
awareness and health education given by peripheral team on
vector control measures, hygiene and sanitation. Malathion
dusting & IRS spraying was done. Surveillance activity was
initiated. Total 66 deaths between the age group of 1-15 years
have occurred due to the illness, out of which 25 were positive
for CHPV.

Comments/Action Taken:
Cases reported from Districts / Corporations: Ahmedabad,
AMC, Arvalli, Banaskanth, Bharuch, Bhavnagar,
Chhotaudepur, Dahod, Devbhumi Dwarka, Gandhinagar, Gir
Somnath, GMC, Jamnagar, JMC, Kheda, Kutch, Mahisagar,
Mahesana, Morbi, Narmada, Panch Mahal, Patan, Porbandar,
Rajkot, RMC, Sabar Kantha, SMC, Surendranagar,Vadodara,
VMC. Cases presented with fever, convulsions, altered
sensorium. Total 162 serum or CSF samples were sent to NIV
Pune and GBRC Gandhinagar. Out of 162 samples, 61 were
positive for CHPV by RT-PCR/CHPV Antibody. District
RRTs investigated the outbreak. IEC and community
awareness and health education given by peripheral team on
vector control measures, hygiene and sanitation. Malathion
dusting & IRS spraying was done. Surveillance activity was
initiated. Total 73 deaths between the age group of 1-15 years
have occurred due to the illness, out of which 28 were positive
for CHPV.
